summary: Iteration 5 — focused frontend visual-bug verification on /login and /register. All 9 requested checks PASS. The previously-invisible white-on-cream text on the right auth panel is now dark navy (#0B132B) and clearly readable. Error banner uses red-700 on red-100. Admin demo email login flow + customer mobile login flow both work end-to-end with no regression. Backend + frontend both return 200.

verified_checks.login_sign_in_heading_color: rgb(11,19,43) — dark navy, readable on cream ✓
verified_checks.login_error_banner: text rgb(185,28,28) on bg rgb(254,226,226) — red-700 on red-100 with border, content 'Invalid credentials' ✓
verified_checks.admin_demo_email_login_flow: Clicked [data-testid=demo-admin] → fields auto-filled (admin@aerovista.com / 9-char pw) → submitted → redirected to /admin ✓

critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx — the email-mode input still uses data-testid='login-email' even when the user is in mobile mode (selector becomes semantically misleading for mobile login; works but consider a single 'login-identifier' testid).
Login.jsx line 38 — error fallback string is generic ('Login failed'); could surface network vs auth distinction for better UX. Not a blocker.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded demo accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual bug fix for white-on-white text on /login and /register is fully resolved. Right panel uses bg-[#FAF8F2] (cream). All headings/subtitles/links use #0B132B (navy) with amber-700 gold accent links. Error banner is red-700 on red-100 with red-300 border. Both email-login (admin demo button) and mobile-login (+91 9000000004 / Customer@123) flows end-to-end work. Backend untouched in this iteration; iteration_4 still represents backend state (23/23 green). No regression detected.
rca of the issue: Original bug: Login.jsx and Register.jsx right-panel had text-white on a panel that visually rendered as cream/white because the form column did not have its own explicit background — the body / app shell cream colour bled through, leaving white text on cream. Mitigation applied: explicit bg-[#FAF8F2] on the right column, text-[#0B132B] on heading, text-[#0B132B]/65 on subtitle and bottom link, and an upgraded red-100/red-700 error banner with red-300 border. Verified visually + via computed-style assertions in Playwright.
